  3. Tyson McGuffin

United States

Tyson McGuffin

Athletic pressure, spin, and high-energy singles/doubles play

Biography

Tyson McGuffin came through tennis and coaching before becoming one of pickleball’s best-known professional personalities. His game is useful for studying energy management, spin pressure, serve-plus-one patterns, and how athletic defense can shift momentum in singles and doubles.

Major skills

Serve pressureSpin drivesSingles movementCompetitive tempoDefensive gets

Career notes

  • PPA profile lists him as an active top-level tour player across divisions.
  • Long-time pro champion and ambassador figure.
  • Known for energy, athletic defense, and a recognizable personal brand.

Events

SinglesMen’s doublesMixed doubles

Paddle / sponsor line

Selkirk / sponsored line varies by season

What to study

Study serve-plus-one pressure and emotional momentum.
